productDisplayName: Fossil Women Green Dial Watch ES2951
description: Case style: Analogue watch with an aluminium circular case, has a fixed bezel with stone-studded detail, stainless steel backDial style: Green dial, has hour, minutes and seconds hands, markingsFeatures: Three subdials for day, date and hour displays, a screw to reset the time and functionsStrap style: Green aluminium bracelet-style strap, secured with a butterfly claspWater-resistant up to 50 mComes in an authentic Fossil collectible tinWarranty: 2 years international warranty from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects onlyWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
